project.name: PharMinds Algeria
project.type: PFE (Projet de Fin d'Etudes) — Final Year University Project
project.author: Renouni Abderrahmane
project.description: An AI-powered pharmacy management platform for Algeria. Features role-based dashboards (Admin, Pharmacist, Patient), AI prescription scanning using a custom-trained TrOCR OCR model, an AI medical chat assistant, and integration with Supabase for backend/auth.

local_ocr.description: Custom TrOCR model served via FastAPI on localhost:8001

ai_chat_and_structuring.tier_3_openrouter: OpenRouter API — Llama 3.3 70B for chat, Llama 4 Maverick for vision

stage_1_local_ocr.step_1: User uploads prescription image in PrescriptionScanner.tsx
stage_1_local_ocr.step_2: Image optionally preprocessed (contrast, rotation) via ImagePreprocessor.tsx
stage_1_local_ocr.step_3: Image sent to local FastAPI server (localhost:8001/scan) via Vite proxy (/ocr-api)
stage_1_local_ocr.step_4: EasyOCR CRAFT detects text line bounding boxes
stage_1_local_ocr.step_5: Each cropped line is fed to TrOCR for text recognition
stage_1_local_ocr.step_6: Basic regex extracts doctor name and medications from raw lines
stage_1_local_ocr.step_7: Returns raw_ocr lines + extracted_data + base64 line_crops for feedback

stage_2_ai_structuring.step_1: Raw OCR text lines are sent to AI Brain (Arcee/OpenRouter) via structureTextWithAI()
stage_2_ai_structuring.step_2: AI returns structured JSON: doctor_name, prescription_date, medications[]
stage_2_ai_structuring.step_3: Structured result overwrites raw regex extraction for better accuracy

active_learning_feedback.description: After scanning, the UI shows each cropped text line with predicted text. User can correct mistakes and submit to POST /feedback, which saves the corrected image+text directly into the training dataset for future fine-tuning.

ai_chat_pipeline.description: Streaming AI chat assistant for medical questions
ai_chat_pipeline.system_prompt: Bilingual medical assistant (French/Arabic) specialized in Algerian pharmacy

key_files.src/App.tsx: Main router — defines all routes with ProtectedRoute wrappers
key_files.src/lib/ai-service.ts: Central AI service — handles OCR, chat, vision, provider fallback
key_files.vite.config.ts: Vite config with proxies: /ocr-api -> localhost:8001, /supabase-api -> supabase
key_files..env: Environment variables (Supabase keys, AI API keys)

key_components.src/components/pharmacist/PrescriptionSc: Main prescription scanning UI with image upload, OCR results display, and active learning feedback
key_components.src/components/pharmacist/ImagePreproces: Image preprocessing (contrast, brightness, rotation) before OCR
key_components.src/components/landing/: Landing page sections (HeroSection, StatsSection, ModulesSection, etc.)

ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/serve.py: FastAPI server — endpoints: POST /scan, GET /health, POST /feedback
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/pipeline.py: PrescriptionOCR class — CRAFT detection + TrOCR recognition + regex extraction
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/generate_dataset.py: Synthetic data generator — creates printed + handwritten line images
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/extract_real_lines.py: Extracts text line crops from raw prescription photos using OpenCV
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/auto_annotate.py: Uses Gemini API to auto-label cropped line images
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/merge_feedback.py: Merges user feedback data into the main training labels.csv
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/cleanup_dataset.py: Dataset cleanup — removes duplicates, fixes mislabeled data
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/regenerate_handwritten.py: Regenerates handwritten samples with real handwriting fonts
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/dataset/labels.csv: Main training labels — 9373 rows (6373 printed + 3000 handwritten)
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/fonts/: Handwriting fonts (Caveat, DancingScript, IndieFlower, Kalam, PatrickHand)
ocr_model_directory.ocr-model/real_data_lines/: Cropped lines from real prescription photos + annotations

supabase_directory.supabase/set_admin.sql: SQL to set admin role for abdorenouni@gmail.com

.env (ocr-model/).GEMINI_API_KEY: Used by auto_annotate.py for batch labeling

torch_version_compatibility.issue: torch 2.7.1+cu118 version string breaks transformers' is_torch_greater_or_equal() check, causing check_torch_load_is_safe() to reject model loading
torch_version_compatibility.fix: Monkey-patched in pipeline.py: torch.load patched for EasyOCR, and transformers.modeling_utils.check_torch_load_is_safe set to lambda:None

windows_encoding.issue: UnicodeEncodeError when printing emojis/unicode on Windows terminal (cp1252)
windows_encoding.fix: os.environ['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1' set at top of serve.py

easyocr_progress_bar.issue: EasyOCR's download progress bar causes encoding errors on Windows
easyocr_progress_bar.fix: stdout temporarily redirected to devnull during model initialization in serve.py

dataset_corruption_fixed.issue: 3000 'handwritten' images were generated with system fonts (Arial/Times) because font ZIP downloads were corrupt HTML files
dataset_corruption_fixed.fix: Renamed to 'printed_', downloaded real handwriting fonts (Caveat, DancingScript, etc.), regenerated 3000 genuine handwritten samples

dataset_status.real_prescription_data: 9 real prescription photos in ocr-model/real_data_raw/, 167 extracted line crops in ocr-model/real_data_lines/

next_steps: User will provide additional real-world prescription dataset to merge
Retrain TrOCR model with cleaned + expanded dataset
Improve regex extraction in pipeline.py for better medication parsing
Consider adding more handwriting fonts for diversity
Test active learning feedback loop end-to-end
